location.heading: What problems does AI sales enablement solve?

findings.sentence: [**Content decay and inconsistency**](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2468227625004168) **:** assets age quickly, “latest” versions multiply, and teams end up using conflicting messaging across regions.
